arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta's worst fear realised as Arsenal boss changes tune on squad depth
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta is no longer as content over his squad's depth, it seems, after a couple of high-profile injuries have left the Gunners looking light in places

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs. Dinamo Zagreb: Mikel Arteta motivated by Dubai before Champions League showdown?
arts.sum: The prospect of a warm-weather training camp in Dubai should be all the motivation that Arsenal need to defeat Dinamo Zagreb, according to Gunners expert Charles Watts.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Dinamo Zagreb – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal host Dinamo Zagreb in the Champions League as the Gunners look to take a step closer to the knockout rounds. Mikel Arteta’s side have only triumphed once in their last five games after they dropped points from a winning position against Aston Villa. Arteta has confirmed that Ethan Nwaneri and Riccardo Calafiori are available […] The post Arsenal vs Dinamo Zagreb – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: ‘Huge admiration’: David Ornstein says Arsenal really like winger who’s faster than Bukayo Saka
arts.sum: Arsenal are in the market to bolster their attack. Arsenal have been linked with tons of strikers as of late. Alexander Isak is a dream...

arts.ttl: Full Arsenal squad available vs Dinamo Zagreb as duo return but five players ruled out
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka, Ben White, William Saliba, Gabriel Jesus and Takehiro Tomiyasu all remain sidelined with injury. Arteta also confirmed that Ethan Nwaneri and Riccardo Calafiori will return to the matchday squad after their spells on the sidelines.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta considering surprise Arsenal position change after William Saliba injury
arts.sum: Gunners down to bare bones of defensive options after setbacks

arts.ttl: Champions League permutations: What Arsenal need to qualify for knockout stages
arts.sum: Gunners closing in on crucial top-eight finish

arts.ttl: Man Utd HIJACK of Arsenal deal ‘one to watch’
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has suggested that Manchester United may attempt to hijack Arsenal ’s attempt to land Wolves attacker Matheus Cunha, describing him as “one to watch” in the January transfer window. Cunha has failed to sign a new contract with the Molineux club and has become a serious transfer target for Arsenal this January.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer could be blocked by Premier League rule in fresh Mikel Arteta blow
arts.sum: However, English top-flight clubs can only make two loan signings from Premier League clubs, a limit the Gunners have already reached with Raheem Sterling and Neto. arts.ttl: Teenager Arrested Over Social Media Abuse of Kai Havertz' Wife
arts.sum: A 17-year-old boy has been arrested in connection to online abuse sent to Kai Havertz and his wife, Sophia Weber.
